mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, university_id, major_id, collect_time, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{universityId}, #{majorId}, NOW(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND university_id = #{universityId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND university_id = #{universityId}
